title: Forgot Your Lunch
prompt: You forgot your lunch and need a plan for today.

choices.label: Buy lunch for $4
choices.ledger_note: Bought lunch to stay ready.

choices.label: Use snacks from home
choices.ledger_note: Used what you already had and protected cash.

choices.label: Skip lunch to save money
choices.ledger_note: Skipped lunch and your energy dipped.

title: Friends Want Food After School
prompt: Friends want to grab food after school, but it was not in your plan.

choices.label: Go and spend $12
choices.ledger_note: Spent on a social want after school.

choices.label: Go but spend only $5
choices.ledger_note: Joined friends with a spending limit.

choices.label: Pass and keep your plan intact
choices.ledger_note: Protected your plan and skipped the extra spend.

title: Ride Falls Through
prompt: Your normal ride falls through and you need a quick transportation plan.

choices.label: Pay $3 bus fare
choices.ledger_note: Paid bus fare to stay on schedule.

choices.label: Call for a free ride
choices.ledger_note: Asked for help instead of spending right away.

choices.label: Miss the trip and stay home
choices.ledger_note: Missed out because you had no backup plan.

title: Unexpected School Fee
prompt: A school fee pops up that you did not plan for.

choices.label: Pay the $10 fee now
choices.ledger_note: Covered the school fee right away.

choices.label: Move $10 from savings to checking
choices.ledger_note: Moved money from savings to handle the fee.

choices.label: Wait and deal with it later
choices.ledger_note: Delayed the fee and risked a late cost.

title: Family Needs Help
prompt: A family member asks you to chip in a little money for something important.

choices.label: Help with $15
choices.ledger_note: Helped family with a needed expense.

choices.label: Help with $7 and explain your limit
choices.ledger_note: Helped some while protecting your own plan.

choices.label: Say no for now
choices.ledger_note: Kept your money but the moment felt heavy.

title: Phone Charger Breaks
prompt: Your charger stops working and you need to decide how to handle it.

choices.label: Buy a basic charger for $9
choices.ledger_note: Bought a basic charger and solved the problem.

choices.label: Borrow one and wait until next week
choices.ledger_note: Borrowed a charger and waited for a better time to buy.

choices.label: Buy the $25 deluxe bundle
choices.ledger_note: Turned a need into a bigger want purchase.

title: Weekend Event Invite
prompt: There is a paid weekend event everyone is talking about.

choices.label: Go and spend $20
choices.ledger_note: Spent heavily on a weekend event.

choices.label: Skip this one and save for the next
choices.ledger_note: Skipped now and moved money toward a future want.

choices.label: Choose a free hangout instead
choices.ledger_note: Chose a free option and kept your money.

title: Bad Weather Changes the Day
prompt: Bad weather changes your schedule and you have to pivot.

choices.label: Adjust your plan and keep moving
choices.ledger_note: Adjusted your plan and stayed productive.

choices.label: Spend $8 on convenience items
choices.ledger_note: Spent on comfort to get through the day.

choices.label: Do nothing and lose the day
choices.ledger_note: Let the schedule collapse and lost momentum.

title: Club or Activity Fee
prompt: A club or activity fee is due sooner than expected.

choices.label: Pay the $14 fee
choices.ledger_note: Paid the activity fee and stayed involved.

choices.label: Find a fundraising option first
choices.ledger_note: Looked for another way to cover the fee.

choices.label: Quit to avoid paying
choices.ledger_note: Avoided the fee but lost the activity.

title: Birthday Gift Pressure
prompt: A friend birthday is coming up and you feel pressure to spend.

choices.label: Buy a $18 gift
choices.ledger_note: Bought an expensive gift to keep up.

choices.label: Set a $6 gift budget
choices.ledger_note: Gave a thoughtful gift inside your budget.

choices.label: Make something meaningful instead
choices.ledger_note: Chose a low-cost thoughtful gift.

title: Babysitting: Life Scenario 1
